COMMENT_TRAINING_CONSTRAINT: this should match the way catalog is constrained via catalog_constratins

training_constraints.categories: jeans, jewellery, necklaces, pants, purses, rungs, shoes, skirts, sneakers, tops, women, dresses, handbags
training_constraints.colors: beige, brown, burgundy, cream, black, brown, gray, magenta, navy, ivory, white

COMMENT_CATALOG_CONSTRAINT: To avoid openAI prompt size limit, reduce full catalog using catalog_constraint
COMMENT_CATALOG_CONSTRAINT_1: Use only one of the constraints

catalog_constraints.COMMENT_ATTR_CONSTRAINT: restrict catalog based on specific attribute and its value
catalog_constraints.COMMENT_SIZE_CONSTRAINT: restrict catalog based on number of products in it, from start to maxnumber
